infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to take profile photos and job documentation.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses location to match you with nearby jobs and services.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app uses the microphone for video messages.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app accesses your photo library to upload profile photos and job images.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to quickly and securely access your account.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Use Face ID to authenticate with biometric data.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to upload profile pictures and job images.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app accesses your camera to take profile pictures and job documentation.
